mapper.select: SELECT bp.id AS bp_id, bp.tenant_id AS bp_tenant_id, bp.country_id AS bp_country_id, bp.bank_option_id AS bp_bank_option_id, bp.card_owner AS bp_card_owner, bp.card_owner_type AS bp_card_owner_type, bp.day_start AS bp_day_start, bp.day_end AS bp_day_end, bp.day_end_monthly_cap_enabled AS bp_day_end_monthly_cap_enabled, bp.frequency AS bp_frequency, bp.supplier_account_id AS bp_supplier_account_id, bp.supplier_price AS bp_supplier_price, bp.customer_account_id AS bp_customer_account_id, bp.customer_price AS bp_customer_price, bp.company_account_id AS bp_company_account_id, bp.company_price AS bp_company_price, bp.contract AS bp_contract, bp.insurance_price AS bp_insurance_price, bp.sop AS bp_sop, bp.remark AS bp_remark, bp.status AS bp_status, bp.resend_schedule_day_start AS bp_resend_schedule_day_start, bp.resend_schedule_day_end AS bp_resend_schedule_day_end, bp.resend_schedule_frequency AS bp_resend_schedule_frequency, bp.created_by AS bp_created_by, bp.updated_by AS bp_updated_by, bp.created_at AS bp_created_at, bp.updated_at AS bp_updated_at, bc.code AS country_code, bo.name AS bank_name, sa.account_id AS supplier_account_code, sa.name AS supplier_account_name, ca.account_id AS customer_account_code, ca.name AS customer_account_name, coa.account_id AS company_account_code, coa.name AS company_account_name FROM bank_process bp LEFT JOIN bank_country bc ON bc.id = bp.country_id LEFT JOIN bank_option bo ON bo.id = bp.bank_option_id LEFT JOIN account sa ON sa.id = bp.supplier_account_id LEFT JOIN account ca ON ca.id = bp.customer_account_id LEFT JOIN account coa ON coa.id = bp.company_account_id WHERE bp.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY bp.day_start DESC, bp.id DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, country_id, bank_option_id, card_owner, card_owner_type, day_start, day_end, day_end_monthly_cap_enabled, frequency, supplier_account_id, supplier_price, customer_account_id, customer_price, company_account_id, company_price, contract, insurance_price, sop, remark, status, resend_schedule_day_start, resend_schedule_day_end, resend_schedule_frequency, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM bank_process WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bank_process ( tenant_id, country_id, bank_option_id, card_owner, card_owner_type, day_start, day_end, day_end_monthly_cap_enabled, frequency, supplier_account_id, supplier_price, customer_account_id, customer_price, company_account_id, company_price, contract, insurance_price, sop, remark, status, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{countryId}, #{bankOptionId}, #{cardOwner}, #{cardOwnerType}, #{dayStart}, #{dayEnd}, #{dayEndMonthlyCapEnabled}, #{frequency}, #{supplierAccountId}, #{supplierPrice}, #{customerAccountId}, #{customerPrice}, #{companyAccountId}, #{companyPrice}, #{contract}, #{insurancePrice}, #{sop}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE bank_process SET day_start = #{dayStart}, day_end = #{dayEnd}, day_end_monthly_cap_enabled = #{dayEndMonthlyCapEnabled}, frequency = #{frequency}, supplier_account_id = #{supplierAccountId}, customer_account_id = #{customerAccountId}, company_account_id = #{companyAccountId}, supplier_price = #{supplierPrice}, customer_price = #{customerPrice}, company_price = #{companyPrice}, contract = #{contract}, insurance_price = #{insurancePrice}, sop = #{sop}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bank_process_share WHERE bank_process_id = #{bankProcessId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, bank_process_id, account_id, amount, sort_order FROM bank_process_share WHERE bank_process_id = #{bankProcessId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bank_process_share (bank_process_id, account_id, amount, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.bankProcessId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.amount}, #{item.sortOrder})
